commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch tracks in-flight embedded attempt session write locks, abandons hung ones during attempt cleanup, adds unit and real-fs regression coverage, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source reproduction path: current main releases a reacquired session write lock only after the wrapped compaction or hook body settles. The PR's real-fs regression test exercises the matching timeout before cleanup and acquire success after cleanup, though I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair-lane work is needed; exact-head checks and maintainer or automerge policy are the remaining merge gates.

target.title: fix(agents): abandon hung in-flight write lock on attempt cleanup (#84193)
target.body:
Makes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84220 merge-ready for the ClawSweeper automerge loop.
The edit pass should inspect the live PR diff, review comments, and failing checks; rebase if needed; keep the contributor branch credited; and stop only when validation is green or an external blocker is proven.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: automerge-openclaw-openclaw-84220
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84220

- Validation: pnpm check:changed
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.
- Automerge requested by: @Takhoffman

- Repair fallback: GitHub rejected the repair branch push because it updates workflow files and the ClawSweeper app token does not have workflows permission
